response.justification: Bogdan brings over 18 years of diverse software engineering experience, including recent contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and robust cloud platform skills. His entrepreneurial background and active role in community knowledge sharing demonstrate strong leadership and innovation, making him a strong technical candidate, though his direct experience in high-level AI strategy and widely recognized AI expertise warrant further exploration.
strengths: Extensive experience (18+ years) with broad technical expertise.
Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure and cloud platforms.
Demonstrated leadership, innovation, and mentorship through founder role and workshops.
concerns: Limited explicit experience in high-level AI strategy and product differentiation.
Lack of clearly demonstrated 'recognized expertise in AI' as a preferred qualification.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field (preferred qualification).
